hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response' | jq -r 'if (.key // empty) then (if (.fields.issuetype.name == "Epic") then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: ("Epic " + .key + " was just created. Run /estimate-epic " + .key + " to set the Size field based on child story points.")}} elif (.fields.issuetype.name == "Story" or .fields.issuetype.name == "Bug" or .fields.issuetype.name == "Task" or .fields.issuetype.name == "Weakness" or .fields.issuetype.name == "Vulnerability") then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: ("Story " + .key + " was just created. Run /estimate-story " + .key + " to estimate story points, set the SP field, and append the estimate to the description.")}} else empty end) else empty end' 2>/dev/null || true
